zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellena Bostock於大約1439年出生在英國英格蘭爾亨波瑞時，她的父親Matthew Bostock40歲，母親Ellena Boswell20歲。她於大約1462年與Richard Masterson of Nantwich在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellena Bostock于大约1439年出生在英国英格兰爾亨波瑞时，她的父亲Matthew Bostock40岁，母亲Ellena Boswell20岁。她于大约1462年与Richard Masterson of Nantwich在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世在英国英格兰爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bostock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Bostock in Cheshire (Botestoch in Domesday Book), so named with an Old English personal name Bōta (see Bott ) + Old English stoc ‘place’.

variants.name: Bostwick
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northwestern England perhaps a variant of Bostock , and in southeastern England a variant of Bastick (see Bostick 1) with rounding of the vowel.

variants.name: Bott
meanings: English: nickname from Old French bot ‘toad’ (compare Bottrell ). Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Botte (a survival of Old English Botta). Compare Botting .
South German: occupational name for a messenger, from Middle High German bote ‘messenger, emissary’.

nameMeanings.name: Ellena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a variant of   Helena   or possibly a fanciful spelling of   Eleanor  , influenced by   Ellen .

en.lifeSummary: When Ellena Bostock was born about 1439, in Henbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Matthew Bostock, was 40 and her mother, Ellena Boswell, was 20. She married Richard Masterson of Nantwich about 1462, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellena Bostock est née environ 1439, à Henbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Matthew Bostock, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ellena Boswell, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Masterson of Nantwich environ 1462, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellena Bostock um 1439 in Henbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Matthew Bostock 40 und ihre Mutter Ellena Boswell 20. Sie hat um 1462 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Masterson of Nantwich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellena Bostock è nata il circa 1439 nel Henbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Matthew Bostock, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Ellena Boswell, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Richard Masterson of Nantwich circa 1462, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellena Bostockが約1439年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヘンブリーで生まれた時，父Matthew Bostockは40歳，母Ellena Boswellは20歳であった。約1462年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでRichard Masterson of Nantwichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellena Bostock(이)가 대략 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 헨버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Matthew Bostock(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellena Boswell(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1462년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Richard Masterson of Nantwich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellena Bostock nasceu aproximadamente 1439, em Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Matthew Bostock, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Ellena Boswell, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Masterson of Nantwich aproximadamente 1462, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellena Bostock родилась около 1439 г. в местности хенбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Matthew Bostock было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellena Boswell, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Masterson of Nantwich около 1462 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellena Bostock nació aproximadamente 1439, en Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Matthew Bostock, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Ellena Boswell, tenía 20 años.
